name: multi-tab-coordination
description: Agent opens multiple tabs and queries context across them.

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'openTab should succeed'}, {ok: response.tabId !== undefined, message: 'should return tabId'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'second tab should also open'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'switchTab should succeed'}, {ok: response.tabId === 1, message: 'should return the switched tabId'} ]
